patents.title:
教材製作工具及方法
TOOL AND METHOD FOR CREATING TEACHING MATERIAL
patents.abstract:
一種教材製作工具及方法,其包含一素材資料庫、一編輯模組、一擷取模組及一分析模組。該素材資料庫用以存放知識素材。該編輯模組執行教材之編輯及處理。該擷取模組根據該編輯模組之目前編輯教材設定相關知識素材之資訊,至該素材資料庫擷取相關之知識素材做為教材製作時之推薦參考素材以及供該編輯模組進行編輯。該分析模組分析該擷取模組所擷取之相關知識素材以供該編輯模組進行編輯,藉以增加教材製作之效率。
A tool and method for creating teaching material includes a material database, an editing module, an acquisition module and an analyzing module. The material database is used for storing knowledge materials. The editing module executes editing and processing of the teaching materials. The acquisition module sets relative information of the knowledge materials according to a currently editing material in the editing module, and acquires relative knowledge materials from the material database to be recommended materials for creating the teaching material and edited by the editing module. The analyzing module analyzes the relative knowledge materials acquired by the acquisition module for providing the editing module to edit, whereby increasing the efficiency of creating teaching material.

patents.title: 互動式教學方法、系統及記錄媒體
patents.abstract: 本發明提供一種互動式教學方法、系統及記錄媒體，該方法包含：顯示一第一動態教學畫面於一顯示裝置；擷取至少一使用者之一影像信號；依據該影像信號與該動態教學畫面間的對應關係決定一比對結果；及依據該比對結果顯示一第二動態教學畫面於該顯示裝置。該互動式教學方法可活化傳統教學、激發教師創意、讓使用者在遊戲中快樂學習及增進使用者彼此互動與團隊學習。本發明同時提供實施該互動式教學方法之系統及記錄媒體

patents.title:
語文能力之教學主系統及其使用方法
MAIN TEACHING SYSTEM AND USE METHOD OF THE SAME FOR ENHANCEMENT OF LANGUAGE ABILITY
patents.abstract:
本發明係有關於一種語文能力之教學主系統及其使用方法,係為一種針對語文能力訓練的教學系統,其主要將出題系統、答題系統、評分管理系統、瀏覽複習系統及資料庫系統架構在網路主機中,讓授課者透由出題系統,將語文訓練檢測內容以錄音方式出題且儲存於資料庫系統,再讓學習者經由答題系統回答問題,讓授課者可經由評分管理系統的結果得知其學習成果,而學習者亦可經瀏覽複習系統瀏覽授課者的檢測題目、自我的回答錄音及參考的答案內容,及比對參考答案內容並反覆錄音練習,以作為學習改進的基礎,增加語文能力者;另外,學習者的家長亦可透由電話語音系統及瀏覽複習系統了解學習者的學習狀態及進度;藉此,達到課後練習互動的效果,同時也讓家長參與了解及關心學習者語文能力學習成果者。
The invention is related to a main teaching system and use method of the same for enhancement of language ability, wherein the main teaching system is designed for training the language ability. The subsystems for question posing, question answering, management of evaluation, surfing and reviewing, and database are mainly structured in the host of the network so as to enable the teacher to pose question from the testing content for language training by the way of sound recording and store the information in the database subsystem through the question posing subsystem. Continuously, the learner can answer the question through the question answering subsystem, and the teacher can learn the studying result from the subsystem of management of evaluation. The learner can also surf the testing question provided by the teacher, the response of sound recording by oneself, the reference of answer, and practice repeatly by comparing with the reference of answer through the subsystem of surfing and reviewing. Accordingly, the purposes of improving study and language ability can be achieved. Furthermore, the householder of the learner can also learn the situation and advance of studying through the subsystem of telephone speech sounds and the subsystem of surfing and reviewing. Therefore, the effects of practice and interaction after school can be achieved, and the householder can also understand and concern the learner with respect to the learning result of the language ability.

patents.title:
學生學習狀況查詢系統與方法
ENQUIRY SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR STUDENT'S LEARNING CONDITIONS
patents.abstract:
一種學生學習狀況查詢系統與方法，係整合校務系統與學生管理，提供網頁登入方式查看學生的成績、出席狀況與其預警內容，以此建立學生家長、學習導師與學生之間的關懷網絡，其主要查詢方法之實施例主要包括此學生學習狀況查詢系統提供網路登入環境，使用者能於通過身分認證後登入系統，系統接著依據登入的資訊判斷所對應的學生資料，並由校務系統引入出席記錄、修習記錄，再透過網頁呈現，並顯示預警訊息。
An enquiry system and a method for student's learning conditions are provided. This system integrates a school administration and student management for providing users to view the student's score, attendance condition and related early-warning message via a web page. The object of present invention is to establish a concerning relationship between parents and their children or teachers and their students. The preferred embodiment of the invention provides a network logon system, then the users can login the system after authentication. Next, the enquiry system determines the student based on the logon information. Next, a school administration system incorporates and shows a attendance record, a learning record and the related early-warning message on the web page.

patents.title:
整合數位學習平台之知識管理系統
Knowledge management system integrates with e-learning platform
patents.abstract:
一種整合數位學習平台之知識管理系統，其系統主要包括：文件分析擷取模組：模組主要針對不同的資料格式進行擷取，俾以利於全文檢索引擎、自動分類引擎之分析處理，搜尋引擎：其係提供使用者利用關鍵字或關鍵字組查詢資料，且查詢的資料來源為透過擷取所得的資料源，同義詞模組：配使用者以關鍵字查詢資料時，主動針對所輸入的關鍵字，推薦同義的其他關鍵詞，關聯詞模組：利用透過擷取的技術分析，動產生關聯詞庫，文件自動分類模組：利用擷取的技術，分析文章（文件）的內容，由系統主動推薦所屬的分類，知識地圖模組：提供管理工具讓管理者可建立樹狀、網狀的分類目錄，每個分類可設定管理者進行管理，除以內容分析提供自動分類建議外，管理者可設定規則，過濾資料內容；結合上述模組之整合管理，藉由運用知識管理技術有效地支援學程需求、整合規劃、學習輔導及管理決策，將資源有效地投資在規劃的目標上，進而達到提昇學習成果、品質與系科競爭力之使用目的。
This invention is a knowledge management system that integrates with an e-learning platform. It comprises: a text-mining and aggregator module that aggregates different data formats so as to facilitate analysis processes of a full-text search engine and an automatic classification engine; a search engine, which allows a user to utilize a keyword or a keyword combination to perform a search, wherein a returned data source is a data source aggregated through the text-mining and aggregator module; a synonym module that makes a recommendation of synonymous keywords according to an initial input keyword when the user performs a keyword search; a related-word module that automatically generates a related-word thesaurus based on aggregated technical analysis; a document automatic classification module that utilizes an aggregated technique to analyze the content of an article (document) such that the system can automatically recommend its classification; a knowledge map module that provides a management tool to enable an administrator to build a tree-type or a nested-type classification catalog, wherein each classification can assign a manager to manage, besides automatic classification recommendations based on content analysis, the administrator can also set up special rules to help filtering data content. Combining the aforementioned modules, integrated management process, and through the use of knowledge management technology, it can effectively support learning process needs, integrate planning, learning counseling, and management decision. As a result, resources can be efficiently invested on a planned target to achieve increasing of learning outcomes, quality, and subject competitiveness.

patents.title:
語言學習出題系統及方法
TESTING ITEM GENERATION SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR LEARNING LANGUAGES
patents.abstract:
一種語言學習出題系統及方法，其透過擷取學習者所學習過之字詞的例句，並檢索出學習者所學習過之字詞的相似字詞，然後再依據此字詞、所擷取到的例句以及所檢索出的相似字詞來生成測驗題，以供學習者進行自我學習測驗。藉此，除了可以提供學習者自我學習測驗外，更可以進一步在學習者的自我測驗過程中，增強學習者對相似字詞的印象，進而提升其分辨能力。
A testing item generation system and method for learning languages is provided. By capturing the example sentence of the words learned by a learner, searching the similar words of the learned words and generating an examination according to the learned words, the captured example sentence and the searched similar words, the learner may perform learning test by himself/herself. Besides, it also can improve the ability of the learner to differentiate words by enhancing the impression of similar words on the learner during the learning test by himself/herself.

patents.title:
即時學習狀態量化回饋之數位學習點系統
Digital learning unit system with real time learning state presented by quantitative feedback information provides learners and teachers quantitative information
patents.abstract:
一種即時學習狀態量化回饋之數位學習點系統,主要係以量化數値提供學習者與教學者一個即時學習狀態回饋的機制,提昇雙方對於學習狀態的了解,而本創作藉由學習時系統根據認知負荷評量與學習成效評量所產生之量化訊息作為即時學習狀態回饋的設計,搭配由數個學習點所構建而成,但不一定是單一固定的學習單元之組合作為參考,而動態的提出一個最佳學習路徑的建議,以期使學習過程更靈活,且更有效的協助學習者完成最佳化與適性學習的目標。
A digital learning unit system with real time learning state presented by quantitative feedback information provides learners and teachers quantitative information through real time learning state feedback device, which improves the acknowledgement of learning state for both learners and teachers. The quantitative information of this invention is based on the feedback from cognitive load evaluation and learning performance evaluation. The digital learning material is constructed by several "learning sections" which are composed by "learning units" but the relation between learning units and learning section can be re-composed according to the learning state to develop an optimal learning path dynamically. This invention provide more flexible learning process to assist learners accomplishing adaptive and optimal learning effectively.

patents.title:
多版本式數位學習系統
MULTI-EDITION DIGITAL LEARNING SYSTEM
patents.abstract:
本發明揭露一種多版本式數位學習系統,係結合一伺服器端(server end)之主系統與複數個客戶端(client end)之學生透過網際網路實施之。包括一資料輸入模組、一學生資料庫、一考題資料庫預先規劃有複數個相異主題與具有多個不同難易度等級的能力指標規劃、一版本選擇模組具有預先設定之複數個相異版本以及根據該各版本規劃的章節供學生選擇、一版本參照表具有上述複數個相異版本間之各章節對應關係的版本參照代碼;一線上測驗模組、以及一成績評量模組,紀錄學生每次測驗的主題、版本、章節、考題與測驗成績,同時記錄學生每次測驗的錯誤考題,除提供家長與老師隨時可以瞭解學生的歷次錯誤題目外,並將該錯誤考題與未測考題於該學生下次測驗時主動提出以供學生進行測驗。其中,考題資料庫之各考題具有一各自的識別資料,該識別資料具有能力指標與版本參照代碼。
This invention relates to a multi-edition digital learning system, which communicates a main system at server end and a plurality of client terminals via internet. The digital learning system comprises an input module, a student database, a question database, a version selection module, a version concordance, an on-line testing module, and a evaluation module. The question database has plural subjects, distinct versions with chapters, and aptitude-schemed questions. The version concordance shows the relationship of those versions and chapters. Each question of the question database accompanies with an individual identification index comprising a schemed aptitude and concordance index.

patents.title:
電子教學評量裝置
Evaluation apparatus of electronic teaching
patents.abstract:
一種電子教學評量裝置,包含一分析處理機構;以
及分別與分析處理機構連接之個人化機構、系統品質機
構、資訊品質機構、服務品質機構、系統使用機構、使
用者滿意度機構、淨利益機構、驗證機構與人機介面。
藉此,可利用人機介面配合分析處理機構進行個人化機
構、系統品質機構、資訊品質機構、服務品質機構、系
統使用機構、之使用者滿意度機構、淨利益機構及驗證
機構中之資料設定及分析,藉以構成電子化之教學評
量,而可節省評量成本及時間,達到評量結果準確度高
及快速取得評量結果之功效。

patents.title:
結合學習管理與資源規劃功能之多重互動式虛擬研討會系統
Multi-interactive virtual workshop that incorporates learning management and resource planning
patents.abstract:
本發明係關於一種具備多重互動性的虛擬研討會系統(V3系統),特別是把現有之學習管理系統(LMS)架構與企業資源規劃(ERP)系統做充分的結合,所形成的一種新的企業管理與訓練學習系統。根據本發明該等多重互動式的V3系統,可將一般實體企管顧問課程的研討會(workshop)訓練模式予以電子化,經由模組化的流程設計功能,可以提供線上研討會、學習進修與員工訓練等多重功能。其不但具有實體研討會應有的腦力激盪、潛能開發、主持人即時調整內容等功能,還可提供學員與學員間、以及學員與教師之間的互動機制,而教師也可以按照學員的學習狀況機動的調整學習內容。透過此一靈活機動的學習管理系統,可將蘊藏於企業流程內之資源做出更快速且更好的規劃與運用。
This invention relates to a multi-interactive virtual workshop (V3 system), particularly to a novel system that effectively incorporates existing learning management system (LMS) and enterprise resource planning (ERP) to facilitate learning enterprise management and training. According to this multi-interactive V3 system, training model of an ordinary physical business administration workshop can be realized electronically through a modular flow design function, so as to provide a multi-function of online workshop, educational learning, and employees training. This invention not only provides function of brainstorming, potential development, and real-time content adjustment by the host, but the interactive mechanism among students as well as between students and teachers. The teacher can dynamically adjust learning contents according to learning conditions of students. Enterprise resource can be better planed and utilized quickly by this agile and mobile learning management system.

patents.title:
教材製作工具及方法
TOOL AND METHOD FOR CREATING TEACHING MATERIAL
patents.abstract:
一種教材製作工具及方法,其包含一素材資料庫、一編輯模組、一擷取模組及一分析模組。該素材資料庫用以存放知識素材。該編輯模組執行教材之編輯及處理。該擷取模組根據該編輯模組之目前編輯教材設定相關知識素材之資訊,並至該素材資料庫擷取相關之知識素材以做為教材製作時之推薦參考素材以及供該編輯模組進行編輯。該分析模組分析該擷取模組所擷取之相關知識素材以供該編輯模組進行編輯,藉以增加教材製作之效率。

The analyzing module analyzes the relative knowledge materials acquired by the acquisition module for providing the editing module to edit, whereby increasing the efficiency of creating teaching material.

patents.title:
結合學習管理與資源規劃功能之多重互動式虛擬研討會系統
Multi-interactive virtual workshop that incorporates learning management and resource planning
patents.abstract:
本發明係關於一種具備多重互動性的虛擬研討會系統(V3系統)，特別是把現有之學習管理系統(LMS)架構與企業資源規劃(ERP)系統做充分的結合，所形成的一種新的企業管理與訓練學習系統。
    根據本發明該等多重互動式的V3系統，可將一般實體企管顧問課程的研討會(workshop)訓練模式予以電子化，經由模組化的流程設計功能，可以提供線上研討會、學習進修與員工訓練等多重功能。其不但具有實體研討會應有的腦力激盪、潛能開發、主持人即時調整內容等功能，還可提供學員與學員間、以及學員與教師之間的互動機制，而教師也可以按照學員的學習狀況機動的調整學習內容。透過此一靈活機動的學習管理系統，可將蘊藏於企業流程內之資源做出更快速且更好的規劃與運用。

According to this multi-interactive V3 system, training model of an ordinary physical business administration workshop can be realized electronically through a modular flow design function, so as to provide a multi-function of online workshop, educational learning, and employees training. This invention not only provides function of brainstorming, potential development, and real-time content adjustment by the host, but the interactive mechanism among students as well as between students and teachers. insight.competitor: 競爭者如Blackboard、Moodle等已經在學習管理系統市場佔有率較高，新加入者需要有強大的技術和市場戰略來取得一席之地。林進興作為發明人，可能具有豐富的企業管理和訓練學習系統開發經驗，對於企業管理和訓練學習系統的需求有深刻的理解。
insight.maturity: 發明類型為發明，表明該技術已經達到了一定的成熟度，具有較強的實用性和創新性。結合學習管理和資源規劃功能的虛擬研討會系統是一種新的企業管理和訓練學習系統，反映了技術成熟度訊號。
insight.trend: 這項技術揭示的商業趨勢或市場方向是企業管理和訓練學習系統的電子化和線上化，未來企業將更加重視線上研討會、學習進修和員工訓練等功能。該技術也反映了企業對於靈活機動的學習管理系統的需求。
insight.moat: 護城河分析：對競爭者的威脅與繞過難度取決於該技術的實施和推廣，若能夠成功推廣和實施，則可以形成一定的護城河，對競爭者形成一定的威脅和障礙。然而，競爭者也可以通過技術創新和市場戰略來繞過和挑戰該技術。

patents.title:
配合實體平面書籍之即時遠距輔助教學方法及系統以及電腦可讀取儲存媒體
Real-time distant teaching aided method and system bundled with physical plane book and computer-readable storage media
patents.abstract:
一種配合實體平面書籍之即時遠距輔助教學方法，由一部學習伺服器與一部學生客戶端所執行，包含下列步驟。學生客戶端透過輸入裝置取得平面出版品上之連續區域影像，辨識出連續區域影像為求救記號，傳送線上教導請求給學習伺服器，其中之線上教導請求包含欲向線上教師求教之訊息。學習伺服器接收線上教導請求後，作為學生客戶端與教師客戶端之中介，用以將由學生客戶端所傳來之第一訊息轉遞給教師客戶端，以及將由教師客戶端所傳來之第二訊息轉遞給學生客戶端。
A real-time distant teaching aided method bundled with physical plane book is executed by a learning server and a student client end. The method includes steps of enabling the student client end to acquire continuous region images on a plane publication through an input device, recognizing a help mark from the continuous region images, and transmitting an on-line teaching request to the learning server, in which the on-line teaching request contains help messages to ask on-line instructors; enabling the learning server to serve as an interface between a student client end and an instructor client end, after receiving the on-line teaching request, for forwarding a first message transmitted from the student client end to the instructor client end and forwarding a second message transmitted from the instructor client end to the student client end.

patents.title:
配合實體平面書籍之即時遠距輔助教學方法及系統以及電腦可讀取儲存媒體
Method and system for real-time long-distance auxiliary teaching method with matching the entity plane books, and readable computer storage medium thereof
patents.abstract:
一種配合實體平面書籍之即時遠距輔助教學方法,由一部學習伺服器與一部學生客戶端所執行,包含下列步驟。學生客戶端透過輸入裝置取得平面出版品上之連續區域影像,辨識出連續區域影像為求救記號,傳送線上教導請求給學習伺服器,其中之線上教導請求包含欲向線上教師求教之訊息。學習伺服器接收線上教導請求後,作為學生客戶端與教師客戶端之中介,用以將由學生客戶端所傳來之第一訊息轉遞給教師客戶端,以及將由教師客戶端所傳來之第二訊息轉遞給學生客戶端。
A method and system for real-time long-distance auxiliary teaching method with matching the entity plane books is disclosed, which are executed on a Learning Server and a Student Client. It includes the following steps: Student Client via an input device to obtain a continuous area image of a plane publication, and the continuous image is identified as a help signal for transmitting online teaching request to the Learning Server, wherein the online teaching request including the help signal to the online teacher. After the Learning Server receiving the online teaching request, acted as an intermediary between the Student Client and the Teacher Client, the first message transmitted from the Student Client can be transferred to the Teacher Client, and the second message transmitted from the Teacher Client can be transferred to the Student Client.

patents.title:
電腦輔助教學方法及其系統
Computer assisted instruction method and its system
patents.abstract:
一種電腦輔助教學方法及其系統，主要是透過一題目選擇模組選擇題目，再經由一題目分析模組分析題目的型態，然後，由學員依據上述題目逐步輸入相對應的作答資料，再利用一過程分析模組判讀前述作答資料與作答流程的正確性，最後，以一記錄模組記錄前述作答資料、作答流程及成績。
The present invention discloses a computer assisted instruction method and its system, which selects questions via a question selection module; analyzes types of the questions via a question analysis module; after a student in turn inputs corresponding answering data according to the abovementioned questions, determines the accuracy of the answering data and its answering procedure via a procedure analysis module; and finally, records the abovementioned answering data, answering procedure and a corresponding grade via a recording module.

patents.title:
反向學習歷程與鼓勵教學之系統
APPARATUS FOR REVERSE PORTFOLIO LEARNING WITH ENCOURAGEMENT SYSTEM
patents.abstract:
本發明揭露一種反向學習歷程與鼓勵教學之系統，藉著利用考卷評量、學習盲點診斷、個性化遊戲、個性化課程四步曲的方法，顯示學生的學習能力(Effort)、學習演進(Progress)與學習成果(Achievement)，提供學習者完整的學習歷程(Portfolio)與自我反省，整個學習歷程以連續考卷評量為開始，診斷學習者的學習盲點，再依個別化的需求，設計遊戲與課程，使學習更有效率。另有一完整性的鼓勵系統，提供學習者一個進階式的學習鼓勵，導引學習者正確學習方向，利用系統化的升等與進階鼓勵學習者，引導正確學習方向，提高學習效率。
Apparatus for reverse portfolio learning with encouragement system includes examination module, interaction learning module, personalized learning module and encouragement module. Unlike the traditional learning system, the examination system can display the weakness of the user, and provides the highly individualized approach to yield best results. The invention proposal the reverse portfolio approach to record the effort, progress, and achievement of the learning portfolio. The system understand that every student has different needs and skill that's we work individually with each student to create an inspiring and comfortable learning environment.

patents.title:
反向學習歷程與鼓勵教學之方法與系統
METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR REVERSE PORTFOLIO LEARNING WITH ENCOURAGEMENT SYSTEM
patents.abstract:
本發明揭露一種反向學習歷程與鼓勵教學之方法與系統，藉著利用考卷評量、學習盲點診斷、個性化遊戲、個性化課程四步曲的方法，顯示學生的學習能力(Effort)、學習演進(Progress)與學習成果(Achievement)，提供學習者完整的學習歷程(Portfolio)與自我反省，整個學習歷程以連續考卷評量為開始，診斷學習者的學習盲點，再依個別化的需求，設計遊戲與課程，使學習更有效率。另有一完整性的鼓勵系統，提供學習者一個進階式的學習鼓勵，導引學習者正確學習方向，利用系統化的升等與進階鼓勵學習者，引導正確學習方向，提高學習效率。
Method and apparatus for reverse portfolio learning with encouragement system includes examination module, interaction learning module, personalized learning module and encouragement module. Unlike the traditional learning system, the examination system can display the weakness of the user, and provides the highly individualized approach to yield best results. The invention proposal the reverse portfolio approach to record the effort, progress, and achievement of the learning portfolio. The system understand that every student has different needs and skill that's we work individually with each student to create an inspiring and comfortable learning environment.

patents.title:
教學軟體之試卷編製系統
An examination paper editing and making system of learning software
patents.abstract:
一種教學軟體之試卷編製系統，主要係包含由不同科目選擇不同版本之課文，於呈現課文內容後，依課文輸入考題並設定標準答案，再將考題及答案設檔儲存，俾於測驗時將所儲存之題目顯示於電腦螢幕以供作答，且於出題時使答案以隨機方式改變其順序，並於測驗後由電腦批改並計算測驗之成績，使教學軟體之電腦測驗更為靈活，並防止不當之作弊。
An examination paper editing and making system of learning software mainly contains steps of (1) selecting different version texts of different subjects and showing the text content, (2) inputting examination questions and setting standard answers according to the texts, and then storing the examination questions and answers. During the test the questions are shown on the monitor and the sequence of the answers is changed randomly. The reviewing and scoring of examination are done by computer. Therefore, the computer based testing of learning software is made more flexible and illegitimate cheating is avoided.

patents.title:
可執行於一電腦之學習能力鑑別系統
Learning capability appraisal system executable on a computer
patents.abstract:
本發明係可執行於一種可執行於一電腦之學習能力鑑別系統，其用來鑑別一被鑑定者的學習能力，並產生適合該被鑑定者的最佳學習模式，該系統包括：一被鍵定者資料庫，其至少包含複數個該被鑑定者的基本資料，其中該基本資料至少包含一年齡；一基本型題庫資料庫，其至少包含複數個基本型鑑定題目，其中該複數個基本型鑑定題目分別係屬於視覺型的題目、聽覺型的題目及操作型的題目，複數個結合該基本型鑑定題目的答案，複數個結合該基本型鑑定題目的預設權重值表；一教材轉換模組，其用以將該基本型鑑定題目依據視覺型、聽覺型、及操作型所屬的複數個因素，轉換為用於一鑑別分析模組的題目，其中該轉換後的題目其各自結合一變化權重值表；該鑑別分析模組，其包括一初級鑑別模組、一中級鑑別模組及一高級鑑別模組；一統計分析模組，其用以接收該鑑別分析模組輸出的結果，及依據該變化權重值表，以產生一視覺型指數、聽覺型指數、及操作型指數；藉由所產生的該視覺型指數、聽覺型指數、及操作型指數，確定該被鑑定者適合視覺型、聽覺型、及操作型等那一個類型的最佳學習模式。
The present invention relates to a learning capability appraisal system executable on a computer, which is provided for appraising the learning capability of the person being appraised, and generating the best learning mode for the person being appraised. The system comprises: a database of the person being appraised, which comprises at least plural fundamental data of the persons being appraised, the fundamental data at least including the age; a basic type questionnaire database comprising at least plural basic type appraisal questions, wherein the plural basic type appraisal questions belong to visual, listening, and operative type questions respectively, plural answers associating with the basic type appraisal questions, and plural preset weight table associating with the basic type appraisal questions; an instructional material conversion module to convert the basic type appraisal questions into the questions for appraisal/analysis module based on plural factors belonging to visual, audio, and operative type questions, wherein the converted question is associated with a variation weight table each. The appraisal/analysis module comprises a primary appraisal module, an intermediate appraisal module and an advanced appraisal module; a statistical analysis module to receive the result outputted by the appraisal/analysis module, and generate a visual index, audio index and operative index based on the variation weight table, so as to confirm the best learning mode of the appraised person to be one of the visual/audio/operative types by the visual index, audio index and operative index.

patents.title:
線上教學教材管理系統以及方法
On-line teaching materials management system and method thereof
patents.abstract:
一種線上教學教材管理系統以及方法，係搭載於如學校、公司組織、社區等區域網路環境，以對特定地區／身分之網路用戶提供一線上教學功能；該線上教學教材管理系統包含一教材管理模組群及一教材學習模組群，當教材管理模組群之教材選擇模組無法從資料庫裡找到合適教材時，指導者可啟動教材增修模組自建教材，或從學習型光碟(e-Learning CD)或網際網路等外部教學資源擷取適用資源併入系統，以克服傳統線上教學系統無法與其他教學資源整合之問題；同時，指導者亦可依照學習者的實際情況選擇適合學習者使用的教材，以藉由該教材學習模組群提供之教材播放、演練及測驗功能，有效提昇學習者的學習成果。本案代表圖：第1圖1   線上教學教材管理系統  100 教材選擇模組101 成績查詢模組          102 教材增修模組110 教材列表模組          111 教材教學模組112 教材演練模組          113 教材測驗模組120 教材索引資料庫        121 教學評量資料庫122 教材列表資料庫        123 人員資料庫2    網路伺服器            3    網路通訊系統4    網路終端裝置
An on-line teaching materials management system and method thereof are coupled with LAN environments such as school, enterprise organization and community, targeting at network user of specific area/identity to provide an on-line learning function; the on-line learning materials management system comprises a teaching materials management module group and a teaching material learning module group. When the teaching material selection module of the teaching material management module group can not locate proper teaching material from database, instructor can initiate teaching material amendment module to self-create teaching material or fetch proper resources from external teaching resources like e-learning CD or internet to integrate with system so as to overcome the issue when conventional on-line learning system can not integrate with other teaching resources; meanwhile, instructor can also follow practical conditions of learner to select materials appropriate for learner's practice, effectively elevating learner's learning result by virtue of the teaching material play, exercise and test function provided by the teaching material learning module group.

patents.title:
以造句方式學習外語之漸進出題方法與系統
Progressive test subject choosing method and system using syntax in learning foreign language
patents.abstract:
一種以造句方式學習外語之漸進出題方法，包括一出題模式決定程序、一句型讀取程序、一句型分割程序、一句型重組程序、一問題輸出程序、一輸入接受程序、一比對程序以及一結果輸出程序。出題模式決定程序決定一出題模式。句型讀取程序自一電腦可讀取之句型資料庫中讀取一原始句型。句型分割程序將原始句型分割為複數個句型組成單元。句型重組程序對等句型組成單元進行亂序重組，以得到一重組句型。問題輸出程序依出題模式輸出重組句型給一學習者。輸入接受程序接受學習者之輸入。比對程序以一比對模組比對原始句型與學習者之輸入，以得到一比對結果。結果輸出程序則輸出比對結果給學習者。
A progressive test subject choosing method using syntax in learning foreign language includes a test subject model determining procedure, a sentence reading procedure, a sentence division procedure, a sentence regrouping procedure, a test subject output procedure, an input acceptance procedure, a comparison procedure and a result output procedure. The test subject model determining procedure decides a test subject choosing model. The sentence reading procedure reads a primitive sentence pattern from the readable sentence pattern library of a computer. The sentence division procedure divides the primitive sentence pattern into multiple sentence units. The sentence regrouping procedure proceeds a random sequence regrouping concerning those multiple sentence units to obtain a regrouping sentence pattern. The test subject output procedure follows test subject choosing model to output the regrouping sentence pattern to a learner. The output acceptance procedure accepts the input of learner. The comparison procedure employs a comparison module to compare primitive sentence pattern with those inputted by learner to get a comparison result. The result output procedure outputs the comparison result to learner.

insight.competitor: 競爭者如Duolingo、Babbel等線上外語學習平台已經占據市場，然而本發明的漸進出題方法可能為溫世仁、張東華、馬蘋蘋等發明人帶來新的市場機會，尤其是在亞洲市場中。這些發明人可能會與現有的教育科技公司合作，共同開發出更完善的外語學習系統。
insight.maturity: 發明類型的技術成熟度訊號表明，這項技術已經達到了一定的成熟度，尤其是在句型分割和重組的算法上。然而，整體系統的穩定性和使用者體驗仍需要進一步的測試和改進。
insight.trend: 這項技術揭示的商業趨勢或市場方向是，線上外語學習將會繼續增長，尤其是在移動設備和人工智慧技術的支持下。未來的外語學習系統將會更加個性化和互動化，能夠根據使用者的需求和學習習慣提供更有效的學習體驗。
insight.moat: 護城河分析顯示，競爭者的威脅主要來自於現有的線上外語學習平台的品牌認知和用戶基數。然而，本發明的漸進出題方法和系統可能會為發明人帶來一定的技術壁壘和知識產權保護，從而提高繞過難度和競爭優勢。

report.what:
提供一個漸進式外語學習系統，讓學習者通過造句方式學習外語。
• 透過系統化的程序逐步增加難度
• 提供個性化的學習體驗
• 促進學習者自主學習
report.why:
標題：外語學習的效率和效果。
說明：這項專利提供了一個漸進式外語學習系統，讓學習者可以通過造句方式學習外語，提高學習效率和效果。這項系統可以根據學習者的能力和需求進行調整，提供個性化的學習體驗。
這項技術帶來的本質改變是，讓學習者可以自主學習，提高學習的自由度和自主性。

系統化的程序逐步增加難度
促進學習者自主學習

4. 句型分割程序將原始句型分割為句型組成單元
▼
5. 句型重組程序對等句型組成單元進行亂序重組
▼
6. 問題輸出程序輸出重組句型給學習者
▼
7. 輸入接受程序接受學習者之輸入
▼
8. 比對程序比對原始句型與學習者之輸入
▼
9. 結果輸出程序輸出比對結果給學習者

signals.title: 其他外語學習系統的缺點
signals.body: 其他外語學習系統通常是通過靜態的測試題進行學習，缺乏個性化和自主性。這項專利的漸進式外語學習系統可以根據學習者的能力和需求進行調整，提供個性化的學習體驗。

signals.title: 線上教育的趨勢
signals.body: 線上教育的趨勢是個人化學習和自主學習。這項專利的漸進式外語學習系統符合這一趨勢，可以提供個性化的學習體驗和自主學習的機會。

signals.title: 如何與其他外語學習系統競爭
signals.body: 這項專利的漸進式外語學習系統可以通過提供個性化的學習體驗和自主學習的機會，與其他外語學習系統競爭。同時，也可以與其他線上教育的趨勢和市場需求相結合。

signals.title: 護城河
signals.body: 這項專利的漸進式外語學習系統的護城河是其提供個性化的學習體驗和自主學習的機會。這使得學習者難以在其他系統中找到相似的體驗，從而使得這項系統具有競爭優勢。

patents.title:
可識別式遙控互動教學系統
Identifiable remote interactive learning system
patents.abstract:
一種可識別式遙控互動教學系統，其包括有：主機系統、遙控受信機與遙控信號傳送器；該主機系統內含微處理機之控制儀器或微電腦系統，用來連接遙控受信機與內置互動學習系統等相關運作軟體；該遙控受信機內含無線傳輸裝置，具有單向的接收或雙向的接收與傳送信號功能，能接收來自配套的遙控信號傳送器所發送的信號，並能解碼識別出該信號的來源傳送器編號與按鈕狀態；該遙控受信機連接於微電腦主機，接受來自微電腦主機的控制信號或傳送來自遙控傳送器的訊息予主機；該遙控信號傳送器內含無線傳輸裝置，具有單向的傳送或雙向的接收與傳送信號功能，傳送器面板設有若干個按鈕及顯示器，每一個都具有唯一的識別碼，按下傳送器按鈕發送信號給配套的遙控受信機時，信號中將包含了識別碼與按鈕編碼。其由微電腦主機和若干連接微電腦主機的遙控受信機，與一組具個別識別碼的掌上型遙控信號傳送器所組成，在同一操作空間內，受信機可以接收並識別不同的信號傳送器所傳送來的遙控信號，解碼後再經由通訊介面傳送給微電腦主機；藉以達到遙控互動教學的目的。
An identifiable remote interactive learning system includes the host system, remote receiver and remote signal transmitter. The host system is embedded with the microprocessor of the control instrument or microcomputer used to connect with the relevant operating software of the remote receiver, the embedded interactive learning system and so forth. The remote receiver is embedded with a wireless transmission device, providing half duplex or full duplex signal transmission and reception, capable of receiving the sending signal of the bundled remote signal transmitter and decoding the source transmitter code and button pressing status of the signal. The remote receiver is connected to the microcomputer host to receive the control signal coming from the microcomputer host or forward the message from the remote transmitter to the host. The remote signal transmitter is embedded with a wireless transmission device, providing half duplex transmission or full duplex reception and signal transmission functions, in which the transmitter panel is installed with several buttons and indicators. Each one has the sole identification code. When pressing button of transmitter to send signal to the bundled remote receiver, the signal contains identification code and press button code. The microcomputer host and several remote receivers in connection with the microcomputer host are integrated with a set of palm type remote signal transmitters with individual identification codes. Within the same operation space, the receiver can receive and identify the remote signals transmitted from different signal transmitters. After decoding and transmitting to the microcomputer host via communication interface, the remote interactive learning goal can hereby be achieved.

patents.title:
測驗題庫的試題衍生方法
Method for inducing test contents from test library
patents.abstract:
本發明係為一種測驗題庫的試題衍生方法，係將一原始試題分離成包括有:題幹(包括答案的完整試題)、答案..等之試題組成部分，再利用一出題工具界面將分離而出的各試題組成部份，重新組合而至少衍生出另一個具有新的測驗標的之衍生試題，運用本方法可使單一題幹衍生出數個測驗標的彼此不同的衍生試題，除了可以提高單一題幹的利用率，還可避免答案部分在不同試題中不斷地重複出現，並且達到出題的靈活性和減少試題之佔用空間的效果。
The invention relates to a method for inducing test questions from test library, which divides the original test contents into the test backbone (including complete test questions and answers), answers and so on as the contents of the test. A test question selection tool interface is further utilized to group all the extracted test questions as an inducing test questions with new test goal. Use this method ,different test goals can be stemmed from a single test backbone. In addition to increasing the utilization of a single test backbone, the answer portion can be prevented from repeatedly appearing in different questions, and the flexibility of test question selection and less space for test questions can be achieved.
